title: 15pcs Chuck Compatible with Dremel Rotary Tool Accessories 0.8mm to 3.2mm Replacement 4486 Quick Change Chuck Replacement 4485 Brass Collet Metal Nut
features: Note: Please measure and compare sizes before purchasing.

Wide Application: Our drill chuck collet chuck set is compatible with dremel rotary tool and ideal for light-duty accessories including drill bits, sanding drums, polishing wheels, wire & bristle brushes, and cut-off wheels.

Keyless Chuck: A built-in spring ensures better attachment and prevents accessories from falling or flying out during use, which provides excellent stability. The keyless chuck can hold various accessories from 1/32" to 1/8" shank sizes.

Metal Nut: Made of metal material, sturdy and stable. The plastic nut on the market often break during use, but the all-metal nut solve this quality problem very well. They are more durable and safer than plastic materials.

Brass Collet: Made of high-quality brass for wear resistance and durability. The brass collet offers a great improvement in precision and holds fine bits more firmly. It not only remains stable at high rotational speeds, but also increases working efficiency.

Perfect After-Sales Service: We provide 100% satisfactory service for the products we sell. If you have any questions during use, please contact us immediately. We will solve the problem for you the first time.
description: Product Description Keyless Quick-Change Chuck: The keyless quick-change chuck allows you to quickly and easily change the attachment on your dremel rotary tool without changing collets. It can improve efficiency and quality while also help you save cost and time. This is ideal when the application requires multiple attachment changes. Replacement 4485 Brass Collet Metal Nut Kit: Why choose high-quality brass collet and metal nuts? Most of the collets used in the market are made of aluminum. This material is soft and easy to wear and tear, so we use a better quality brass material. For plastic nuts, they will break during use, and the all-metal material solves this quality problem very well. They are the perfect addition to your changing or using accessories. The included wrench helps tighten the metal nut. Made of alloy metal, safe and durable. Three-petal clamp, the grip is more stable, and the concentricity is greatly improved. Built-in spring ensures better attachment and prevents accessories from falling or flying out during use. Made of nickel-plated brass, rust and corrosion resistant. Fine texture on the sides, we focus on details. It has strong adaptability and stability. Made of brass material. Solid and Durable, longer service life. The brass collet offers a great improvement in precision and holds fine bits more firmly. It not only remains stable at high rotational speeds, but also increases working efficiency. The chuck collet set is ideal for light-duty accessories including diamond burr, grinding wheel, polishing wheel, carbide burr and wood carving bit and more. They are compatible with dremel rotary tools and are excellent tools for changing accessories. Tips: When you are using, screw on the universal chuck, screw it to 3/4 to insert the accessory and then tighten it. Maximum RPM: 35.000 1/min
